headline: Steady Margins, Slow Gains: Is Home Depot's Strategy Working?
summary: HD holds margins steady amid slow growth, leaning on Pro strength, digital investments and supply-chain integration to sustain profitability and drive engagement.

raw.headline: Steady Margins, Slow Gains: Is Home Depot's Strategy Working?

headline: Why Lowe's is investing in skilled trades and partnering with Nvidia
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma shares insights from her conversation with Lowe's (LOW) CEO Marvin Ellison. Ellison shared why the company is investing $250M in skilled trade positions and partnering with tech giants Nvidia (NVDA), Palantir (PLTR), and Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL).

raw.headline: Why Lowe's is investing in skilled trades and partnering with Nvidia
raw.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma shares insights from her conversation with Lowe's (LOW) CEO Marvin Ellison. Ellison shared why the company is investing $250M in skilled trade positions and partnering with tech giants Nvidia (NVDA), Palantir (PLTR), and Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL).

headline: Lowe's CEO: Response has been great to new home care subscription
summary: CNBC’s “Squawk Box” team discusses Lowe's business performance, its new subscription service HomeCare+ and more with Lowe's CEO Marvin Ellison.
